embeds.title: History of Ost in Edhil
embeds.description:
If one believes the legends told by Queen Sel’ani Suma’tril the Fair (and few in Ost in Edhil would refute it, at least publicly), the city of Ost in Edhil was once the center of a vast Elven kingdom on the continent of Faerûn. The pride of the city, a stone fertility obelisk gifted to them by the gods (or so the Queen claims) helped her kingdom thrive.

That is until the Queen spurned the affections of an Archmage, her closest advisor and the founder of the Arcanum Guild within the city. In jealousy and rage, the Archmage - whose name has been stricken from all records within the city - turned to dark arts of necromancy in pursuit of lichdom. To further his diabolical goals, the Archmage shattered the obelisk to harness its magical power and deliver a crushing blow to the Queen’s empire.

A pink mist spilled forth from the shattered stone, surrounding the city and transporting it, and all inhabitants, to its present location within the Demiplane of Lust.

Of course… that’s the Queen’s official version of events, and the truth is quite different indeed. All that is known for certain is that a number of years ago (i.e. at the time the server was created), a great upheaval befell the city that transported it from Faerûn to the Demiplane in which it currently resides.

fields.name: Shards of the Obelisk
fields.value:
Three years after the cataclysm, adventurers in Ost uncovered another chapter to the history. Shards of the obelisk had begun siphoning lustful energy from the plane, weakening and threatening to unweave it - and dooming all who reside within. Close contact with the shards revealed more of the history of the Demiplane's origins through dreamlike memories etched into the shards themselves.

Adventurers learned that Queen Sel'ani and her Archmage accomplice had imprisoned her twin sister, Lady Aoife, within the Obelisk. Aoife bided her time within her prison, gathering motes of emotion and sparks of lust from her sister's kingdom, and using them to turn her prison into her domain. When the obelisk was shattered, she was freed along with her Domain of Delight.

embeds.title: Cosmology of the Demiplane
embeds.description:
If the Feywild itself is born of dreams, then the Demiplane of Lust is born of __wet__ dreams. A Domain of Delight in the truest sense of the phrase, it is a place of pleasure made manifest, shaped from the raw emotion of desire and carnal hunger. It is not the source of lust, but instead its destination; drawing it into itself to sate the insatiable.

To that end, it manifests portals absolutely anywhere, in any realm, and most often in places of extreme sexual energy, such as orgies or those in the throes of passion, drawing in those whose lustful behavior fuels the Demiplane’s existence. Such portals usually appear as banks of a pinkish-white mist or fog, not unlike that which surrounds the city. They exist only briefly - the duration of an orgasm - and fade just as quickly. 

Conversely, and somewhat paradoxically, it also tends to draw in particularly chaste individuals, leading some among the guild to speculate that it draws power from corrupting such pure souls into lust.

Other portals occasionally open into other places, but even those taking excursions from the Demiplane of Lust often find their way back... eventually.

embeds.title: Planar Traits & Features
embeds.description: The Demiplane of Lust was molded to infuse its erotic and sexual energy into all aspects of its reality. There are many ways that this manifests, and some are more subtle than others.

fields.name: 🔹 The Mists of Lust
fields.value:
Anyone arriving on the plane will sense their libido increasing and their morals loosening. Those who spend years on the plane gradually become more and more lusty and open-minded to new pleasures. Even the most devout and chaste paladin can become no better than a common harlot given enough time under the influence of the plane. While it is possible to resist this influence, most find it easier to simply welcome it.

This influence affects monsters that come to the demiplane as well, either through portals or summoning. Most don't act like the monsters that most adventurers expect, but behave much more lustfully than normal. Even hostile entities like demons are often more inclined to fuck (albeit roughly) than fight.

fields.name: 🔹 Suggestiveness
fields.value:
Anything on the Demiplane that **could** be suggestive **is**. The very terrain often resembles a nude body; rolling hills akin to large breasts or the curve of a hip or thigh, and valleys invoke the image of cleavage. Caves remind one of bodily orifices, and stone pillars are firmly phallic. Springs spurt and gush instead of bubble. Trees look like entwined naked bodies (and, thanks to the dryad population, often are), their fruit and flowers resemble sexual organs, dripping with juices. Even the clouds cast suggestive images across the sky that could make a whore blush. The night sky is likewise filled to every horizon with suggestive constellations of stars. Twin moons occupy the sky, frequently aligning to resemble round and shapely breasts or buttocks. Even the clothes and armor of the inhabitants tend to alter over time to present the wearer in a more alluring (and exposed) fashion.
If there is the slightest opportunity for something to take on an even partial sexual connotation, it will.

fields.name: 🔹 ~~Erratic~~ Erotic Time
fields.value: Time moves strangely in the Feywild, and the Demiplane of Lust is no exception, if not even more pronounced. The phrase "time flies when you're having fun" holds a particular truth in Ost. A few minutes of passionate sex in the Demiplane might see days pass in the real world, and yet decades or centuries might pass in the feywild outside the Demiplane while only a few short weeks or months pass within. Even within the city itself, different people might even experience time differently. In some extreme cases, people have claimed to see the same person in two, or even three different places...

fields.name: 🔹 _Coasts & Waters_
fields.value:
Springs pop up everywhere full of clear, cool water or forming natural pools around hot springs. Popular and well-used ones become permanent features of the plane. The water of the plane, from the springs, streams, or rains, much like the mists themselves, have a mild aphrodisiac effect on those exposed to them.

The rain, when it falls, is light and warm, just enough to make clothes and hair cling to the body in interesting ways ... for those who still wear clothes anyway.

Streams are full of fish and followed along their course by laughing water sprites as they wind their way down to the lakes and pools which are awash with orgiastic creatures linked in an unending revelry of lust and desire.

The Sapphire Lake is full of nymphs, merfolk, and tritons who play in the shallows, while the deepest reaches of Baal's Deep are occupied by many-tentacled things that delight in enjoying those who would enter into their forbidden domain.

fields.name: 🔹 _Forests_
fields.value:
Great forests cover vast areas of the plane, full of game animals and replete with nymphs, dryads, satyrs, and other lustful fey creatures. Every tree hangs with its branches low, laden with fruit and blossom. Every glade home to a forest nymph or satyr, and every tree a dryad, all extremely pleased to greet guests and  welcome wanderers. The thickest and densest such forest, the Moaning Wood, is named for the haunting (and arousing) sounds of moaning which echo through the perpetual twilight of the trees.

Deeper into the forests, they take on a darker, more bestial aspect. The thick canopy blocking out the light and casting the interior in perpetual shadow. Tangling vines and tripping tree roots hinder passage. In some cases, such plants and vines move of their own accord. The animals and fey native to these woods hunt tresspassers like lustful prey, revelling in the chase before satisfying their carnal and animalistic desires.

fields.name: 🔹 _Mountains_
fields.value:
Gently rolling foothills in the demiplane resemble the sensuous curves of a body, breasts, hips, thighs. Mountains suggestively capped with pure white snow which seems to flow down the valleys and crevasses between the peaks. Caves and openings in the stone resemble bodily orifices, often moist and possessing an unusual warmth.

The mountains and hills are home to Giants, among other things. While seldom hostile, affected as they are by the demiplane's influence, their sheer size makes them potentially dangerous to those who often seek them out for just that reason.

fields.name: 🔹 _Swamps_
fields.value: In distant, isolated reaches of the plane lie wetlands, marshes, and swamps. But, rather than stagnant, fetid water, the swampy terrain is filled with colonies of sentient slimes, oozes, and plasmoids. Content to remain in their liquid state until someone wanders into their territory, they often leave such interlopers much messier and stickier than when they arrived.

embeds.title: Pregnancy and Children
embeds.description:
Everyone knows that sex can lead to pregnancy, and this fact remains immutable even in the Demiplane of Lust. There are areas of the Demiplane dedicated to fertility but, outside of such areas, copulation is no more or less fruitful than it is on the material plane.

Some enterprising individuals have developed means to encourage, prevent, hasten, terminate, or any other myriad of effects on an individual's fertility and any resulting pregnancies, essentially allowing the denizens of the Demiplane complete control over their reproductive responsibilities.

Despite the irrefutable cause-and-effect relationship of sex and pregnancy, there is a notable absence of ANY children in the Demiplane. Rumors say that fey bargains were struck during the creation of the Demiplane, promising firstborn children to each of the fey courts. During the orgy that followed the signing of the contract, however, the word 'first' was smeared with cum and the resulting bargain promised **all** of the Demiplane's children to the courts, instead.

Nearly the instant they're born, the Demiplane whisks children away to a destination elsewhere in the Feywild as easily as it draws in others. Through a peculiarity of the interaction between these realms, a portion of the parents' energy is sometimes sent with the child, and given form by fey magic. The child can grow to adulthood with their parents' care and guidance.

In many cases, due the latent influence their origin has on such progeny, they often find their way back to the Demiplane once they've matured. However long it takes for them to mature, usually only a few short weeks or months might have passed in the Demiplane, thanks to the odd movement of time in the demiplane and the feywild at large.

embeds.title: Other Health Concerns
embeds.description:
Another common risk inherent in indiscriminate sexual promiscuity is the spread of sexually transmitted infections. Common, that is, outside of the Demiplane of Lust. Denizens of the demiplane seem to be untouched by such infections, and any who might have been infected prior to their arrival will quickly find such things magically cured. Other illnesses seem likewise affected, though to a lesser degree - it seems that the demiplane is invested in removing impediments to its inhabitants enjoying a good fucking.

Sexual injuries, however, are fairly common. While the demiplane's nature will speed the natural healing process, many afflicted by such injuries are far too impatient to wait and are eager to visit a medical professional ~~or just play doctor~~

embeds.title: Magic and the Weave
embeds.description:
Spellcasters occasionally (when used in an eRP context) find their spells empowered by the Demiplane as their carnal acts fuel the Demiplane in turn. For example, a spellcaster might find their spells being used for lewd activities easier (or even unnecessary) to concentrate on, the effects enhanced, the duration extended to the length of the sexual encounter, or material components unconsumed.
(Note: this is to allow people to flavor their spells within eRP, and will have __**no** mechanical impact__).

fields.name: <:abjuration:1082762165322272880> Abjuration
fields.value: Spells that banish creatures to another plane do not work. Rather, they *appear* to work, but just toss the target elsewhere within the Demiplane. The Demiplane lays claim to those that come to reside within it, and such spells treat the target as though it were their native realm. Those spells whose effects bind or enslave another against their will suffer the same limitations as Enchantment spells.

fields.name: <:conjuration:1082762166190477434> Conjuration
fields.value: Summoning entities from other planes into the Demiplane is no different than on the material plane, but once here the differences are marked. Such entities are likequese affected by the Mists of Lust, making them more sexually charged than normal. Once summoned, such creatures may not want to leave, choosing to remain independent of their summoners' wishes and beyond their control.

fields.name: <:divination:1082762168757387274> Divination
fields.value: Scrying spells seem to be attuned to voyeurism and seem to succeed more readily when the target is engaged in a sexual activity. When such spells go awry, they occasionally show a random carnal encounter instead. Detecting moral alignment instead reveal sexual orientation, and spells that revolve around mental contact seem to draw on the target’s lewdest thoughts or deepest sexual desires.

fields.name: <:enchantment:1082762173241106573> Enchantment
fields.value: Such spells behave peculiarly within the Demiplane and seem less effective against unwilling targets. Mutual consent seems to be enforced on users of this magic, allowing the target to easily shrug off any ill effects they would rather not experience. The reason is simple: the Demiplane is empowered by mutual lust, and one party using magic to force another against their will or remove their consent taints the energy it would draw from such an encounter.

fields.name: <:evocation:1082762176722378896> Evocation
fields.value: Like other schools of magic, evocation effects tend towards more lewd manifestations of their effects, where possible. Temprature play, shock play, and the like. Spiritual Weapon in particular is notorious for manifesting as paddles, dildos and other toys.

fields.name: <:illusion:1082762178509152276> Illusion
fields.value: Illusion spells that create sexual images are more powerful and the Demiplane occasionally grants such constructed images a modicum of sentience beyond their creator's control.

fields.name: <:necromancy:1082762181986242651> Necromancy
fields.value: Necromancy spells are unaffected by the plane. Casters who are more inclined to make use of the returned dead for necrophilia find that practice just as taboo as it is elsewhere. Such casters will find their animated servants refusing to obey when the recipient of their attentions is unwilling.

fields.name: <:transmutation:1082762303197413447> Transmutation
fields.value: Transmutation magic used in a sexual context to alter one's shape for greater variety of sexual encounters is particularly empowered, often lasting the duration of a sexual encounter without demanding the caster's concentration. In such instances, the Demiplane itself seems to maintain the focus on such spells, enabling the caster to focus on ... other matters.

fields.name: Pantheons & Divine Magic
fields.value: Due to the nature of the Demiplane drawing energy into itself from people fucking literally anywhere in the multiverse, this has similarly drawn the attention of a plethora of deities. Clerics of all devotions find their power unaffected by their new plane of existence. Naturally, though, certain deities - such as those whose portfolios include related concepts - have a stronger foothold in the Demiplane, and might empower their adherents’ prayers as described above.

embeds.title: Politics of the Demiplane
embeds.description:
The Archfey who lays claim to the Domain of Delight known as the Demiplane of Lust, is aligned to neither the Seelie nor Unseelie, nor beholden to any court or queen. Lady Aoife has gone to great lengths to remain on good (or at least neutral) terms with the courts. Though the Seelie and Unseelie queens aren't foolish enough to underestimate the hedonistic Archfey, they afford her a begrudging respect.
As a result, the other courts acknowledge her domain as neutral ground from all hostilities. Similar bargains have been struck with all manner of other powerful beings across many planes, allowing normally-hostile creatures a place to vacation from their millennia-long feuds and indulge in their carnal natures for a time.

fields.name: Ost in Edhil
fields.value:
Queen Sel'ani Suma'tril the Fair is known to be the ruler of Ost in Edhil. In truth, the Queen is little more than a figurehead; a noble enjoying an easy life of riches and comfort, who does very little *actual* governing. Most of the real power and responsibility lies with the Guilds. The ruler of the Demiplane seldom interferes in the politics of the city. As long as the lust flows, she is content to let the guilds manage things as they see fit.

There are six guilds in Ost, each maintaining different spheres of influence.

fields.name: 🔮 Arcanum
fields.value: Most assume this guild is for those who practice Arcane magics. Though true, the Arcanum's purpose is the study of esoteric lore and arcane secrets, and is open to those with curious and inquisitive minds. Their guildhall, the Arcanum Tower, houses an extensive library of books ranging from high-minded arcane and occult studies to low-brow raunchy smut. The Arcanum is overseen by the <@&699245661295738891>, in turn advised by the <@&833505842178293790>.

fields.name: 🧤 ||Black Hand||
fields.value: There is no such guild as the ||Black Hand||, at least officially, and it exists as little more than whispered rumors. A guild of stealth, subterfuge, and secrecy, they operate in the shadows as part criminal syndicate, part espionage agency, and part secret enforcers. Their domain are the slums and undercity - those places where people are beneath the notice of the reputable citizens - but ever under the watchful eye of the <@&701985965882867712> and the <@&833508689624563783>.

fields.name: 🕯️ Faith Council
fields.value: The divine is everwhere in the multiverse, and the Demiplane has drawn in followers of countless different faiths and gods. The Council of Faith honors the myriad deities and tends to their followers. The <@&766024439749148672> and <@&782123983797616700> council maintain the temples and keep the citizens in good health, making them one of the guilds closest to the common people.

fields.name: ⚔️ Guardians
fields.value: Ost in Edhil is largely a peaceful city, thanks in no small part to the efforts of the Guardian Guild. A guild of unsurpassed martial prowess, they serve as both the city guard and military arm of Ost in Edhil, under the leadership of the <@&699575897853788302> and the <@&833505914619166721>. The Colosseum serves as their recruitment, testing, and training grounds, but they can be seen patrolling the streets of Ost, keeping it safe for the average citizen.

fields.name: 🍃 Outriders
fields.value: A guild of scouts and explorers who venture out into the mists and guard the roads outside Ost. The <@&853348541287890994> and <@&853349316139024414> have taken it as their duty to explore, map, and protect the wilds of the Demiplane, growing closer to the primal nature of the wilderness. Their lodge is rumored to be hidden in the wilderness beyond the city walls, but only its members know the wilds well enough to find the way.

fields.name: <:silverrose:699470814356963418> Silver Thorn
fields.value: The most socially and politically connected of the guilds, these entertainers, courtesans, and companions service the ruling elite and commonfolk alike from their 'guildhall,' the Silver Thorn Brothel. The <@&699439189447671889> and her <@&833509439277367338> use their vast network of allies and connections to quietly deal in gossip, information, and favors.
